crisis.title: You're not alone
crisis.subtitle: Take a breath. Let's get through this together.

step1.title: Step 1: Safety First
step1.description: Make sure your child and everyone nearby is physically safe. Remove any hazards from reach.

step2.title: Step 2: Reduce Overwhelm
step2.description: Dim lights if possible. Reduce noise. Give your child space. Use a calm, quiet voice or no words at all.

step3.title: Step 3: Connect & Wait
step3.description: Sit nearby at your child's level. Let them know you're there. Wait without demands. The storm will pass.
